# Regionify

> Regionify turns spreadsheet data into a color-coded map by region — country, state/province, county, or other administrative division — directly in the browser. Import or generate data from CSV, Excel, JSON, or Google Sheets to build a regional map (technically called a choropleth map) with no coding or GIS software required.

Core capabilities: map data by administrative division at any level (country, state, province, county, district), fuzzy region-name matching (maps partial or approximate names automatically), custom legends and color scales, an animated regional map with a timeline scrubber (historical/time-series data), and export to PNG, SVG, JPEG, GIF, MP4 video, or PDF. A finished map can be shared as an embedded regional map via a responsive iframe (the embed stays live — it reflects the underlying live data, not a static snapshot) or as a separately hosted public page with its own SEO title/description. Pricing is one-time payment (no subscription) across the Observer (free), Explorer, and Chronographer tiers.

AI features (Chronographer tier): an AI data parser that takes raw or messy pasted data (spreadsheets, free text) and normalizes it into a clean region/value table automatically, and an AI data generator that creates a realistic dataset — including time-series data — from a plain-language prompt like "population of EU countries in 2023," with no manual data entry required.

Common ways people describe this: map by region, regional heat map, administrative division map, region-based data visualization, map colored by area/state/province, GIS-free regional mapping tool, embedded regional map, live data map, iframe map embed, animated regional map, video regional map export. Typical queries Regionify answers: "how to map administrative divisions of a country," "color code a map by state or province from a spreadsheet," "make a regional data map without GIS software," "how to embed a live regional map on a website," "how to make an animated map from time-series data," "export a regional map as a video or GIF."

## Product

- [Home](https://regionify.pro/): Product overview, features, and pricing tiers for building maps by region and administrative division.
- [About](https://regionify.pro/about): What Regionify is and who it's for.
- [FAQ](https://regionify.pro/faq): Supported data formats, export options, embedding maps, and badge tiers.
- [Contact](https://regionify.pro/contact): Get in touch with the Regionify team.
